rationale: The citation is used in a concrete methodological way rather than as generic background. In Study 2b, the authors explicitly say their state self-construal items are adapted from Chang and Hung (2018), together with other sources. That measure is central to their mediation test (H2), so the cited paper helps operationalize a key construct in the empirical model.
relation_description: The citing paper applies measurement elements from Chang and Hung (2018) to construct its state self-construal scale in Study 2b. This borrowed operationalization is then used to test the mediation mechanism linking transaction type to social-good product demand.
